name: file_event_win_shell_write_susp_directory
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\bash.exe", "*\\cmd.exe", "*\\cscript.exe", "*\\msbuild.exe", "*\\powershell.exe", "*\\pwsh.exe", "*\\sh.exe", "*\\wscript.exe")) and (file.path like~ ("C:\\PerfLogs\\*", "C:\\Users\\Public\\*"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("*\\certutil.exe", "*\\forfiles.exe", "*\\mshta.exe", "*\\schtasks.exe", "*\\scriptrunner.exe", "*\\wmic.exe")) and (file.path like~ ("*C:\\PerfLogs\\*", "*C:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*C:\\Windows\\Temp\\*")))
